ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'CONTAINER_GENSET_Quote', AND(ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Type__c ,'End Customer Quote'), OR(ISBLANK( SBQQ__Account__c ),ISBLANK(SBQQ__Opportunity2__c))), IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'CONTAINER_NT_Quote', AND(ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Type__c ,'End Customer Quote'), OR(ISBLANK( SBQQ__Account__c ),ISBLANK(SBQQ__Opportunity2__c))), False) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: End Customer Quote can not be created without Opportunity and Account
